title: Fast Login
description: Allows you to quickly bind password input to a key so other people cannot see it. You no longer need to enter a password.
body:
Sometimes you are in a call with friends, sharing your screen, or streaming live.

You join your favorite server and need to enter a password, but to keep it private, you have to stop sharing your screen first.

This mod lets you enter your password just once in the mod window, and never type it manually again!

Now you can open a convenient menu with F7 and simply press a button — the password will be entered automatically, and no one will see it. You can also bind server registration and any other commands yourself.

All commands you enter are stored in encrypted form in \.minecraft\fastlogin\vault.json, so no one can see your password.

![Mod menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6662d9071ee100859238d6da447311687203da17.png)

![Mod add button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28eb9ff09b75dc887bc7fc9dc2479599709e4689.png)
